diagrams.title: Hasse Diagram of Divisors of 12
diagrams.description: Shows the partial order relation 'divides' on set {1,2,3,4,6,12}
diagrams.purpose: Visualize covering relations and understand how transitive edges are omitted in Hasse diagrams

diagrams.title: Hasse Diagram showing Chain vs Antichain
diagrams.description: Comparison of chain (totally ordered) and antichain (pairwise incomparable) in a poset
elements: Chain: elements arranged vertically, all connected
Antichain: elements arranged horizontally, no connections between them
diagrams.purpose: Distinguish between comparable and incomparable elements visually

diagrams.title: Lattice Structure of Power Set
diagrams.description: Boolean lattice of P({a,b}) showing join (∪) and meet (∩) operations
elements: Join of {a} and {b} is {a,b}, Meet is ∅
diagrams.purpose: Understand lattice operations and properties visually

diagrams.title: Maximal vs Greatest Element
diagrams.description: Two posets: one with unique maximal=greatest, one with multiple maximals
elements: Poset 1: a < c, b < c - c is both maximal and greatest
Poset 2: a and b incomparable, both < c - a and b are maximal (not greatest), c is greatest
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the difference between maximal and greatest elements through counterexamples
